query:
SELECT q.qr_code_id, q.room_id, r.room_number, r.template_id, r.id as room_db_id
FROM peppr_qr_codes q
JOIN peppr_rooms r ON q.room_id = r.id
WHERE q.qr_code_id = 'QR-PEARL-101';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2C19S8bbifd7Eo1.072c8bfadc68 --database jKkhr27mS3Co8cU4bKqLWb --execute SELECT q.qr_code_id, q.room_id, r.room_number, r.template_id, r.id as room_db_id
FROM peppr_qr_codes q

WHERE q.qr_code_id = 'QR-PEARL-101';
